name: Elantris
description: A cursed prince is exiled to a rotting city of the once-godlike while a foreign princess fights for the kingdom he left behind.

name: The Final Empire
description: A street thief joins a crew of magic-wielding rebels plotting to overthrow an immortal god-emperor.

name: The Hope of Elantris
description: A short story set during Elantris, following a teacher protecting children when the city is attacked.

name: Alcatraz Versus the Evil Librarians
description: A boy who breaks everything learns evil Librarians secretly run the world, and his odd family fights back.

name: The Well of Ascension
description: After toppling a tyrant, the rebels must hold a fragile city under siege while an ancient power stirs below.

name: Alcatraz Versus the Scrivener's Bones
description: Alcatraz infiltrates a deadly secret library to rescue family, dodging cursed books and traps.

name: Firstborn
description: A military sci-fi short about a younger brother forever in the shadow of a genius commander.

name: The Hero of Ages
description: The Mistborn trilogy finale, as the world ends in ash and the heroes race to decode an ancient prophecy.

name: Alcatraz Versus the Knights of Crystallia
description: Alcatraz visits the hidden Free Kingdoms and tangles with the elite Knights guarding them.

name: The Gathering Storm
description: The first of Sanderson's three Wheel of Time finale volumes, completing Robert Jordan's epic from his notes.

name: Warbreaker
description: Two princesses, a returned god, and a sentient sword collide in a city ruled by color-fueled magic.

name: What the Storm Means
description: A standalone prologue novelette released ahead of The Gathering Storm.

name: Alcatraz Versus the Shattered Lens
description: Alcatraz defends a kingdom under Librarian siege in the penultimate (originally final) volume.

name: Distinctions
description: A standalone prologue novelette released ahead of Towers of Midnight.

name: The Way of Kings
description: On a storm-battered world, a slave, a scholar, and a warlord are pulled toward the return of ancient knights.

name: Towers of Midnight
description: The penultimate Wheel of Time volume, with the world braced for the Last Battle.

name: Infinity Blade: Awakening
description: A tie-in to the video game, following a warrior bound to fight immortal tyrants in endless duels.

name: The Alloy of Law
description: Three centuries on, Mistborn's world hits the railroad age as a lawman-turned-noble chases a gang of raiders.
series: Mistborn: Era Two — Wax and Wayne (Cosmere)

name: A Memory of Light
description: The Last Battle arrives in the grand finale of The Wheel of Time.

name: By Grace and Banners Fallen
description: A standalone prologue novelette released ahead of A Memory of Light.

name: Legion
description: A man who manifests dozens of hallucinated expert 'aspects' solves a high-tech mystery.

name: The Eleventh Metal
description: A short Mistborn prequel showing a young Kelsier learning Allomancy from a hard mentor.

name: The Emperor's Soul
description: A condemned forger must magically rebuild a murdered emperor's soul in 100 days. Hugo winner.

name: Firstborn & Defending Elysium
description: A paired edition of two early sci-fi short stories.

name: Legion and The Emperor's Soul
description: A paired edition of the two acclaimed novellas.

name: Mitosis
description: A short Reckoners story in which David faces an Epic who can split into copies of himself.

name: Infinity Blade: Redemption
description: The second game tie-in novella, concluding the warrior's fight against the Deathless.

name: Steelheart
description: In a world where superpowered Epics rule as tyrants, a teen joins a resistance hunting their leader.

name: The Rithmatist
description: At a school where chalk drawings come alive as weapons, an un-gifted student investigates kidnappings.

name: Sixth of the Dusk
description: A lone trapper on a deadly island faces outsiders and technology that threaten his world.

name: Skin Deep
description: Stephen Leeds takes a case involving a corpse with a fortune in stolen data hidden in its cells.

name: Words of Radiance
description: Stormlight Archive book two, as oaths are spoken, betrayals land, and the ancient war reignites.

name: Allomancer Jak and the Pits of Eltania
description: A comic in-world adventure serial starring a self-aggrandizing Mistborn-era explorer.

name: Firefight
description: Reckoners book two takes David to a flooded Manhattan ruled by an Epic he can't quite hate.

name: Perfect State
description: A sci-fi novella about a man who rules a simulated reality and the date that upends it.

name: Shadows for Silence in the Forests of Hell
description: A frontier innkeeper hunts bounties in haunted woods where breaking the rules summons the dead.

name: Shadows for Silence in the Forests of Hell; Perfect State
description: A paired edition of the two novellas.

name: Shadows of Self
description: Wax hunts a shapeshifting killer as his modernizing city teeters toward unrest.
series: Mistborn: Era Two — Wax and Wayne (Cosmere)

name: Arcanum Unbounded
description: A collection of Cosmere short fiction with in-world essays mapping the shared universe.

name: Calamity
description: The Reckoners finale, as David confronts the source of the Epics' powers.

name: Edgedancer
description: A streetwise young Radiant named Lift chases a deadly figure across a doomed city.

name: The Bands of Mourning
description: Wax and crew chase a legendary artifact said to grant godlike Allomantic power.
series: Mistborn: Era Two — Wax and Wayne (Cosmere)

name: The Dark Talent
description: The (originally) final Alcatraz book, as the war with the Librarians turns devastatingly personal.

name: White Sand Volume 1
description: A graphic novel set on a sun-scorched world where magic is drawn from sand.

name: Brandon Sanderson's Fantasy Firsts
description: A sampler collection gathering opening books and stories from several of his worlds.

name: Oathbringer
description: Stormlight Archive book three, as Dalinar tries to unite the world against an ancient enemy.

name: Snapshot
description: A detective novella set in a perfect daily recreation of a city used to solve crimes.

name: White Sand Volume 2
description: The second White Sand graphic novel, deepening the conflict on Taldain.

name: Lies of the Beholder
description: The concluding Stephen Leeds novella, as his aspects begin to vanish.

name: Skyward
description: A girl desperate to become a pilot defies a society that branded her father a coward.

name: The Many Lives of Stephen Leeds
description: An omnibus collecting all the Legion novellas plus a new one.

name: Starsight
description: Spensa goes undercover among the aliens besieging humanity to steal the secret of space flight.

name: White Sand Volume 3
description: The final White Sand graphic novel, bringing the Taldain conflict to a head.

name: Dark One Volume 1
description: A graphic novel about a young man destined to be the villain of another world's prophecy.

name: Dawnshard
description: A Stormlight novella following Rysn on a voyage to a forbidden island.

name: Rhythm of War
description: Stormlight Archive book four, where a war of science and song turns inward.

name: The Original
description: A sci-fi novella: a woman is copied and sent to hunt down her own 'original' self.
authors: Brandon Sanderson and Mary Robinette Kowal

name: Cytonic
description: Spensa plunges into a strange pocket dimension to uncover the truth about her powers.

name: Dark One: Forgotten (audio)
description: An audio drama prequel/companion following a journalist investigating a disappearance tied to Mirandus.

name: Defending Elysium
description: A Cytoverse prequel novella set centuries before Skyward.

name: Evershore
description: A Skyward Flight novella centered on Jorgen and Kimmalyn.

name: Lux
description: A Reckoners spin-off set in Texas, following a new cell of Epic hunters.

name: ReDawn
description: A Skyward Flight novella told from the alien pilot Alanik's perspective.

name: Sunreach
description: The first Skyward Flight novella, following FM as the squad faces a desperate fight.

name: Bastille vs. the Evil Librarians
description: A sequel that hands the narration to Bastille for the next chapter of the Librarian war.

name: Mistborn: Secret History
description: A side story revealing what was happening behind the scenes of the original Mistborn trilogy.

name: Stephen Leeds: Death and Faxes
description: A short Stephen Leeds case mixing dated tech and his usual hallucinated experts.

name: The Lost Metal
description: The finale of the Wax and Wayne quartet, tying the era into the wider Cosmere.
series: Mistborn: Era Two — Wax and Wayne (Cosmere)

name: Defiant
description: The fourth and final Skyward novel, as Spensa leads the last push against the Superiority.

name: Dark One: Forgotten
description: The print/script edition of the Dark One companion investigation.

name: Long Chills and Case Dough
description: A comedic noir short story set in the Alcatraz universe.

name: The Frugal Wizard's Handbook for Surviving Medieval England
description: A man wakes amnesiac in an alternate medieval England with only a snarky survival guide.

name: The Sunlit Man
description: A hunted fugitive crash-lands on a world where standing in the sunrise means death.

name: Tress of the Emerald Sea
description: A girl sails an ocean of deadly spores to rescue the boy she loves, narrated by Hoid.

name: Yumi and the Nightmare Painter
description: Two strangers from opposite worlds are swapped body and life, narrated by Hoid.

name: The Most Boring Book Ever
description: A playful children's picture book about a kid who insists nothing fun is happening.

name: Wind and Truth
description: The explosive climax of the first Stormlight arc, with Roshar's fate decided in ten days.

name: Isles of the Emberdark
description: A Cosmere novel following Sixth of the Dusk on a perilous voyage into the emberdark.

name: Tailored Realities
description: A short fiction collection gathering his sci-fi and fantasy tales, some tied to known worlds.

name: Songs of the Dead
description: A musician dies and wakes in a layered London where the living and dead overlap.

name: The Fires of December
description: An upcoming Cosmere novel told in Hoid's voice, planned as a commercial release in late 2026.

name: Blightfall
description: Book one of Riftwake, a Skyward sequel trilogy set shortly after Defiant.

name: Songrise
description: Working title of Riftwake book two, written primarily by Janci Patterson.

name: Riftwake Book Three
description: The planned, currently untitled conclusion of the Riftwake trilogy.

name: The Girl Who Looked Up
description: A Hoid's Storybook picture book adapting an in-world tale, illustrated by Howard Lyon.
authors: Brandon Sanderson, illustrated by Howard Lyon

name: Wandersail
description: A Hoid's Storybook picture book adapting the in-world story of Wandersail.
authors: Brandon Sanderson, illustrated by Howard Lyon

name: The Dog and the Dragon
description: A Hoid's Storybook picture book of an in-world tale, illustrated by Howard Lyon.
authors: Brandon Sanderson, illustrated by Howard Lyon

name: Chasmfriends
description: A Hoid's Storybook picture book of an in-world Rosharan tale, illustrated by Howard Lyon.
authors: Brandon Sanderson, illustrated by Howard Lyon

name: Stormlight Archive Book Six
description: The untitled sixth Stormlight novel, opening the back half of the series.

name: Horneater
description: A planned Stormlight novella focused on Rock (Numuhukumakiaki'aialunamor).

name: Nightblood
description: The long-discussed sequel to Warbreaker.

name: The Silence Divine
description: A planned Cosmere novella set on the world of Ashyn.

name: Dragonsteel
description: A planned far-future Cosmere series centered on Hoid's origins.

name: The Apocalypse Guard
description: A shelved/heavily-reworked novel originally co-developed with Dan Wells; status uncertain.
